description_html:
This event is about individuality – how you interpret a song and connect with the audience using just your voice. It is all about how you make a song your own and make it shine in your own style.
Participants can use an instrumental backing track. Judges will focus on pitch, dynamics, expression, clarity, and stage presence.

Rules and Guidelines:

Preliminary Round:

  • Each Participant Is Required to Submit a Pre-Recorded Vocal Performance as Part of The Initial Selection Process.
  • The Submitted Recording Should Not Exceed a Duration of 2 Minutes.
  • Participants Are Encouraged to Ensure that The Recording Is of Good Quality, with Minimal Background Noise and Clear Audio.

Final Round:

  • Finalists Selected from The Preliminary Round Will Compete in A Live Performance Round.
  • Each Finalist Will Be Given a Maximum of 5 Minutes to Showcase Their Vocal Abilities on Stage.
  • Participants May Bring Any Musical Instruments They Wish to Use as Self-Accompaniment During Their Performance.
  • Participants May Also Use Backing Karaoke Tracks with No Backing Vocals.
  • All Performances Must Be Strictly Live, with No Use of Pre-Recorded Vocals or Instrumental Tracks.
  • Participants Are Encouraged to Showcase Their Unique Vocal Style and Stage Presence While Adhering to The Given Time Constraints.

Solo Instrumental:

  • An Instrumental Performance Event Where Musicians Present a Solo Piece on An Instrument of Their Choice. Any Style Is Welcome – Classical, Contemporary, or Fusion.
  • Evaluation Will Be Based on Technique, Musicality, Rhythm, and Overall Presentation. This Is a Space for Musicians Who Communicate Through Sound Rather than Lyrics.

Rules and Guidelines:

Preliminary Round:

  • Each Participant Is Required to Submit a Pre-Recorded Instrumental Performance as Part of The Initial Selection Process.
  • The Submitted Recording Must Not Exceed 3 Minutes in Duration.
  • Participants Are Advised to Ensure Good Audio Quality, with Minimal Background Noise and Clear Sound of The Instrument.
  • Submissions Will Be Evaluated Based on Musical Technicality, Timing, Expression, and Overall Performance Quality.

Final Round:

  • Participants Shortlisted from The Preliminary Round Will Advance to A Live Performance Round.
  • Each Finalist Will Be Allotted a Maximum of 5 Minutes for Their On-Stage Performance.
  • Participants Must Bring Their Own Instruments. a Drum Kit Will Be Provided.
  • Participants are encouraged to demonstrate their technical proficiency, musical expression, and stage presence while adhering to the given time limits.
